tvShow.name: The Crow Girl
tvShow.overview: DCI Jeanette Kilburn and eminent psychotherapist Dr. Sophia Craven join forces to hunt the killer of young men. The investigation takes Jeanette and Sophia into a dangerous world of historic abuse and murder.

episodes.name: She Sees Herself from Above
episodes.overview: DCI Jeanette Kilburn hunts a killer, leading her to Dr. Sophia Craven.

episodes.name: The Egg She Wishes to Crack
episodes.overview: Another body gives Jeanette new leads, while Sophia is haunted by a patient.

episodes.name: She Wishes to Believe
episodes.overview: Jeanette comes under fire. Madeleine is in danger as Victoria gets closer.

episodes.name: The Dirt She Can't Bury
episodes.overview: A cold case shifts Jeanette's focus, as Sophia gets some distressing news.

episodes.name: She Shoots for the King
episodes.overview: Jeanette and Sophia dig into Victoria's past. Madeleine plans her escape.

episodes.name: I'll See You There
episodes.overview: Jeanette turns to Sophia as her world begins to crumble Victoria seeks revenge.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: DCI Jeanette Kilburn and eminent psychotherapist Dr Sophia Craven join forces to hunt the killer of young men. The investigation takes Jeanette and Sophia into a dangerous world of historic abuse and murder.

episodes.name: We Are Many
episodes.overview: As DCI Jeanette Kilburn navigates her new relationship with Dr. Sophia Craven, a horrifying discovery at a pig farm brings new insight to the investigation. Meanwhile, an accident at a local church reveals a chilling buried secret.

episodes.name: Amor Fati
episodes.overview: Sophia gives a statement to the police. Jeanette fears that Victoria may target Beecham College headmaster Peter Drake and attempts to bring him into protective custody. Mike, at the mortuary, makes a surprising discovery.

episodes.name: Into the Light
episodes.overview: Sophia worries that Victoria's memories are bleeding into her own. Jeanette and Mike identify the body in the crypt and, seeking answers, visit Peter Drake. A new witness comes forward with shocking revelations as Victoria seeks answers from Mary.

episodes.name: Divide and Conquer
episodes.overview: Jeanette and Mike identify the girl from the freezer, leading them to the care home's owner. Meanwhile, officers make a discovery that provides new insight into a suspect as Sophia continues to experience Victoria's memories.

episodes.name: Swan Song
episodes.overview: As Victoria issues a chilling ultimatum, a shaken Sophia leaves a message for Jeanette. Meanwhile, David goes on the run after CCTV places him at Mary's murder site, and mounting evidence forces Jeanette to question Sophia herself.

episodes.name: Alma Mater
episodes.overview: With her career hanging in the balance, Jeanette returns to police HQ determined to solve the case before Verity removes her. A discovery from Sophia's flat reveals old secrets and new connections that tie the crimes together.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Jeanette is hunting the killers of young male asylum seekers, but the case becomes even more twisted when a mummified body is discovered hidden inside a church wall, and another body is found in a freezer.

videos.name: The Crow Girl | Opening theme | Intro
